name: should create a query with fields from season prop betting markets
description: Test case for should create a query with fields from season prop betting markets
expected_query: with "t57df61360da44a4cc815e9dfe475ddcf_markets" as (select "source_id", "source_market_id", "time_type" from "prop_markets_index" where "market_type" = 'SEASON_PASSING_YARDS' and "time_type" = 'CLOSE' and "prop_markets_index"."year" = 2026 and "source_id" = 'FANDUEL'), "t57df61360da44a4cc815e9dfe475ddcf" as (select pms.selection_pid, pms.selection_metric_line from "t57df61360da44a4cc815e9dfe475ddcf_markets" as "m" inner join "prop_market_selections_index" as "pms" on "pms"."source_id" = "m"."source_id" and "pms"."source_market_id" = "m"."source_market_id" and "pms"."time_type" = "m"."time_type" where "pms"."selection_type" in ('OVER')), "tcc977836b239a45e2a59843c8e7d88e0_markets" as (select "source_id", "source_market_id", "time_type" from "prop_markets_index" where "market_type" = 'SEASON_RECEIVING_YARDS' and "time_type" = 'CLOSE' and "prop_markets_index"."year" = 2026 and "source_id" = 'FANDUEL'), "tcc977836b239a45e2a59843c8e7d88e0" as (select pms.selection_pid, pms.selection_metric_line from "tcc977836b239a45e2a59843c8e7d88e0_markets" as "m" inner join "prop_market_selections_index" as "pms" on "pms"."source_id" = "m"."source_id" and "pms"."source_market_id" = "m"."source_market_id" and "pms"."time_type" = "m"."time_type" where "pms"."selection_type" in ('OVER')), "t66f463e5d80648c409a671403565982f_markets" as (select "source_id", "source_market_id", "time_type" from "prop_markets_index" where "market_type" = 'SEASON_RUSHING_YARDS' and "time_type" = 'CLOSE' and "prop_markets_index"."year" = 2026 and "source_id" = 'FANDUEL'), "t66f463e5d80648c409a671403565982f" as (select pms.selection_pid, pms.selection_metric_line from "t66f463e5d80648c409a671403565982f_markets" as "m" inner join "prop_market_selections_index" as "pms" on "pms"."source_id" = "m"."source_id" and "pms"."source_market_id" = "m"."source_market_id" and "pms"."time_type" = "m"."time_type" where "pms"."selection_type" in ('OVER')) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t57df61360da44a4cc815e9dfe475ddcf"."selection_metric_line" AS "season_prop_line_betting_market_0", "tcc977836b239a45e2a59843c8e7d88e0"."selection_metric_line" AS "season_prop_line_betting_market_1", "t66f463e5d80648c409a671403565982f"."selection_metric_line" AS "season_prop_line_betting_market_2", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t57df61360da44a4cc815e9dfe475ddcf" on "t57df61360da44a4cc815e9dfe475ddcf"."selection_pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tcc977836b239a45e2a59843c8e7d88e0" on "tcc977836b239a45e2a59843c8e7d88e0"."selection_pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t66f463e5d80648c409a671403565982f" on "t66f463e5d80648c409a671403565982f"."selection_pid" = "player"."pid" group by player.fname, player.lname, "t57df61360da44a4cc815e9dfe475ddcf"."selection_metric_line", "tcc977836b239a45e2a59843c8e7d88e0"."selection_metric_line", "t66f463e5d80648c409a671403565982f"."selection_metric_line", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
